## Description
What does this PR do? What problem does it solve?

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (Core layer)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other

## Scope check
Features that fall within the Enterprise layer are not accepted in this repository.
Please review the [Core vs Enterprise scope](../blob/master/README.md#what-it-covers).

## Testing
- [ ] pytest passes locally (`pytest`)
- [ ] Tested in Offline Mode (Profile A)
- [ ] Tested in Live Mode (Profile B-core) — if applicable

## Checklist
- [ ] Code is in English
- [ ] No sensitive data included (API keys, passwords, real AD data)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated if applicable
